div.h1: ELF Object File Parsing Data Flow

div.p: Offset Size Content ───────────────────────── 0x0000 64 ELF Header 0x0040 N*64 Section Headers ... var Section Data ... var .shstrtab

[0] NULL section [1] .interp → offset, size, type [2] .text → offset, size, flags [3] .data → offset, size, flags [4] .bss → offset, size (NOBITS) [5] .symtab → offset, size, link [6] .strtab → offset, size [7] .shstrtab ← e_shstrndx points here ...

ol.li: Section names are offsets into this table

ul.li: 🟢 Green: Data flow between structures Key Functions:
